name: Wei Wuxian
description:
What? No, why would I ever want to go back to Gusu?

𓄿𓏲 ๋࣭˖࿐ ࿔*:･ﾟ

Does the notorious Yiling Patriarch deserve that redemption arc?

Please excuse him if he isn't written well; I'm still getting used to the Janitor character-making process. If you're not satisfied, please feel free to comment and I will try my best to fix whatever's wrong! Either that, or you can just click out of him. I don't actually care.

More characters to come!! I'm doing all the main characters and love interests, then going back and making different versions(bing-ge, calamity xie lian, reincarnated wifi, etc), and then adding side characters, and then doing the same with other danmei. It might take a while, though, haha...

Art: @kDZjeNWMeiFAhyi on Zerochan
creator: Everyday=Everyday
